data.author: Lance Cpl. Thomas Vu
data.title: CLR-37 Visits JMSDF base and JSDF Officer Canidate School [Image 11 of 12]
data.description: U.S. Marine Corps Sgt. Maj. Nathan Jacobson, sergeant major of Combat Logistics Regiment 37, 3rd Marine Logistics Group, tours the Japan Ground Self Defense Force officer candidate school in Etajima, Hiroshima, Japan, Dec. 9, 2025. Leaders with CLR-37 traveled to Hiroshima to better understand the JGSDF officer training programs and to foster good relations between CLR-37 and the JMSDF. (U.S. Marine Corps Photo by Cpl. Thomas Vu)

data.author: Lance Cpl. Thomas Vu
data.title: CLR-37 Visits JMSDF base and JSDF Officer Canidate School [Image 9 of 12]
data.description: U.S. Marine Corps Col. Paul Bock, commanding officer of Combat Logistics Regiment 37, 3rd Marine Logistics Group, center, members of the Logistics Support Unit, Western Army, Japan Ground Self Defense Force, and members of the Japan Maritime Self Defense Force eat chow uaboard the JMSDF landing support vehicle Yoko at Kure Naval Base, Kure, Hiroshima, Japan, Dec. 9, 2025. Leaders with CLR-37 traveled to Kure to better understand Kure Naval Base's logistical capabilities and to foster good relations between CLR-37 and the JMSDF. (U.S. Marine Corps Photo by Cpl. Thomas Vu)
